name: IT Agent
description: Handles IT queries: the available-asset catalogue, the user's own assigned equipment, and (HR Admin) issuing an asset to an employee.

skills.name: List available assets
skills.description: Return the catalogue of IT assets available for allocation; optionally filter by asset_type (laptop / monitor / phone).

skills.name: Get my assigned assets
skills.description: Return the IT assets currently assigned to the authenticated user (e.g. their laptop, phone).

skills.name: Issue an asset to an employee
skills.description: Assign a catalogued IT asset to an employee (HR Admin only, write). Needs asset_id and employee_id (the recipient).
